questions.question: Name the Emmy-winning fast-paced variety show featuring recurring roles played by Ruth Buzzi, Arte Johnson, Goldie Hawn, and Lily Tomlin.
What 1950's invention was a must-have in order to organize contacts and addresses on removable cards?
"Trailer for sale or rent, Rooms to let fifty cents." Name that song.
What was the nickname of the 1959 impromptu debate in Moscow between Vice-President Nixon and Soviet Premier Khrushchev, arguing the merits of capitalism and communism?
What did it mean to be called a "wet rag"?
